node.text: John finds it rewarding to make a difference in the community.
John's family motivates him to strive for change.
John faced challenges in getting sponsors for the charity run but was successful in the end.

node.text: John values Maria's passion and motivation in supporting causes and spreading positivity in the community.

node.text: John looks at a picture of his family when times get hard to remember why he is doing his work.
John has been delving into local politics, talking to community leaders, understanding neighborhood needs, and feeling optimistic about it.
